---
title: "Tunnel Road to Claremont Loop"
---
**14.2 miles<br> 1,502.3 ft elevation gain<br> Start: MacArthur BART<br> End: MacArthur BART**  





## Map
<iframe
  src="../data/routes/tunnel-to-claremont-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Data
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>9.73</td>
      <td>69.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.32</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.18</td>
      <td>8.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.74</td>
      <td>5.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.19</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
